Goal Module¶

Goal entity module.

Represent a goal tile that marks level completion.

class model.entities.objects.goal.Goal(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: Entity

Represent a goal tile.

Used as an objective tile in the game world. Reaching this tile typically triggers level completion.

__EXPECTED_PARAMETERS: dict[str, type] = {}¶

Floor has no additional initialization parameters.

__ID_PREFIX: str = 'G'¶

Unique prefix for Floor entities.

_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶

RPG Game
